description_long: This hot-air balloon features three large, spherical, deep red envelopes with a slightly textured, matte surface. The envelopes are connected by visible metallic suspension frames and chains, converging at a central, boxy basket structure below. The basket appears to be constructed from a combination of wood and metal, with three angular stabilizing fins or landing skids extending outward. The top of each balloon envelope has a dark opening, likely for venting hot air. The overall design is robust and industrial, with exposed structural elements and a utilitarian aesthetic. No decorative patterns or markings are visible on the envelopes, which are uniformly colored.
description: A triple-envelope hot-air balloon with deep red, textured spheres, metallic frames, and a central boxy basket with angular landing skids.
description_view_0: Three red balloon envelopes are visible, with the basket and two metallic skids most prominent beneath the front envelope.
description_view_1: The central envelope is most prominent, with all three landing skids and the basket clearly visible below.
description_view_2: The rightmost envelope is in the foreground, with the basket and one extended skid most visible beneath.
description_view_3: All three envelopes are equally visible, with the basket and all three skids radiating outward in a tripod-like arrangement.
attribute_envelope_pattern: Solid color; the envelopes are uniformly deep red with no visible patterns, stripes, or logos.
